title: neocastela depressa
intro: Neocastela depressa, also known as False Pimpernel, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Neocastela depressa include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Neocastela depressa is typically prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties.
